reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the bridge collapse featured in The Public Domain.
2. Determine how many people were killed in that bridge collapse and return the count.
original_final_question: How many people were killed in the collapse of the bridge featured in the drama film, The Public Domain? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which bridge collapse impacted characters in The Public Domain? Evidence: The Public Domain (film): The film follows characters whose lives were impacted by the collapse of the I-35W Mississippi River bridge on August 1, 2007. -> I-35W Mississippi River bridge

Node 2: How many people were killed when that bridge collapsed? Evidence: I-35W Mississippi River bridge: During the evening rush hour on August 1, 2007, it suddenly collapsed, killing 13 people and injuring 145. -> 13 people
